_comment: Recorded Strapi v4 REST response shape for PRD-205-R3 / R28 (v4 envelope handling). Two tutorials entities in the v4 wrap-and-attributes form (`{ id, attributes: {...} }`). PRD-205-R26 says v4 source_id is `v4:<id>` because no documentId exists.

attributes.title: Next Steps
attributes.summary: Where to go after the basics.
attributes.body:

Dive deeper into the SDK.
